text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This spell should be imbued with a mysterious
force at dusk that really powers it up...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Three Goddesses! I challenge you to a magic duel!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll use a reflect spell so your magic doesn't work
on me... Let's see if you can break my spell!
